introSection: Lil Dipper Roller Coaster  is an Allan Herschell Company kiddie roller coaster currently located at Sluggers & Putters in Canal Fulton, Ohio, USA. The ride previously operated at LeSourdsville Lake Amusement Park in Middletown, Ohio, USA from 1968 through 2002, where it was known as Little Dipper.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Lil Dipper was manufactured in 1956. It opened at LeSourdsville Lake Amusement Park in 1968 and operated through 2002, being standing but not operating in 2000 and 2001 and again from park closure at the end of 2002 through 2010 or 2011. It was then relocated to Sluggers & Putters, where it reopened on July 28, 2015.

sections.title: Color Scheme
sections.content: A blue track with yellow supports.

fullText:
Lil Dipper Roller Coaster  is an Allan Herschell Company kiddie roller coaster currently located at Sluggers & Putters in Canal Fulton, Ohio, USA. The ride previously operated at LeSourdsville Lake Amusement Park in Middletown, Ohio, USA from 1968 through 2002, where it was known as Little Dipper.

Lil Dipper was manufactured in 1956. It opened at LeSourdsville Lake Amusement Park in 1968 and operated through 2002, being standing but not operating in 2000 and 2001 and again from park closure at the end of 2002 through 2010 or 2011. It was then relocated to Sluggers & Putters, where it reopened on July 28, 2015.





A blue track with yellow supports.
